sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE BPQMCFG_PARAMETROS ( IDCONFIG NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL, CODEMP NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL, MOD_NC_ATIVO CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'S' NOT NULL, MOD_FORN_ATIVO CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL, MOD_DOC_ATIVO CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL, MOD_GM_ATIVO CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL, EMAILNOTIF VARCHAR2(100), DIASAVISO_DOC NUMBER(4) DEFAULT 30 NOT NULL, DIASRESP_FORN NUMBER(4) DEFAULT 10 NOT NULL, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL, DTCRIACAO DATE DEFAULT SYSDATE NOT NULL, DTALTER DATE, CODUSU_ALTER NUMBER(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_BPQM_CFG_PARAMETROS PRIMARY KEY (IDCONFIG), CONSTRAINT UQ_BPQM_CFG_PARAM_EMP UNIQUE (CODEMP), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_CFG_MOD_NC CHECK (MOD_NC_ATIVO IN ('S','N')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_CFG_MOD_FORN CHECK (MOD_FORN_ATIVO IN ('S','N')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_CFG_MOD_DOC CHECK (MOD_DOC_ATIVO IN ('S','N')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_CFG_MOD_GM CHECK (MOD_GM_ATIVO IN ('S','N')) ); COMMENT ON TABLE BPQMCFG_PARAMETROS IS 'QualityManager: configuracoes e ativacao de modulos por empresa'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMCFG_PARAMETROS.CODEMP IS 'FK -> TSIEMP.CODEMP'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMCFG_PARAMETROS.MOD_NC_ATIVO IS 'S=Modulo NC ativo, N=inativo'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMCFG_PARAMETROS.MOD_FORN_ATIVO IS 'S=Modulo Fornecedores ativo, N=inativo'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMCFG_PARAMETROS.MOD_DOC_ATIVO IS 'S=Modulo Documentos ativo, N=inativo'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMCFG_PARAMETROS.MOD_GM_ATIVO IS 'S=Modulo Gestao Mudancas ativo, N=inativo';
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE BPQMCFG_PARAMETROS ( IDCONFIG BIGINT NOT NULL, CODEMP DECIMAL(38,0) NOT NULL, MOD_NC_ATIVO CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'S' NOT NULL, MOD_FORN_ATIVO CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL, MOD_DOC_ATIVO CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL, MOD_GM_ATIVO CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL, EMAILNOTIF VARCHAR(100), DIASAVISO_DOC BIGINT DEFAULT 30 NOT NULL, DIASRESP_FORN BIGINT DEFAULT 10 NOT NULL, CODUSU INT NOT NULL, DTCRIACAO DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE() NOT NULL, DTALTER DATETIME, CODUSU_ALTER INT, CONSTRAINT PK_BPQM_CFG_PARAMETROS PRIMARY KEY (IDCONFIG), CONSTRAINT UQ_BPQM_CFG_PARAM_EMP UNIQUE (CODEMP), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_CFG_MOD_NC CHECK (MOD_NC_ATIVO IN ('S','N')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_CFG_MOD_FORN CHECK (MOD_FORN_ATIVO IN ('S','N')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_CFG_MOD_DOC CHECK (MOD_DOC_ATIVO IN ('S','N')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_CFG_MOD_GM CHECK (MOD_GM_ATIVO IN ('S','N')) );

sql.oracle: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_BPQM_CFG_PARAMETROS START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE;
sql.mssql: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_BPQM_CFG_PARAMETROS START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1;

CREATE TABLE BPQMLOG_AUDITORIA ( IDLOG BIGINT NOT NULL, DTREGISTRO DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE() NOT NULL, MODULO VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, ENTIDADE VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, IDENTIDADE BIGINT NOT NULL, ACAO VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, CAMPO_ALTERADO VARCHAR(60), VALOR_ANTERIOR VARCHAR(2000), VALOR_NOVO VARCHAR(2000), DESCRICAO VARCHAR(500), CODUSU INT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_BPQM_LOG_AUDITORIA PRIMARY KEY (IDLOG) );

sql.oracle: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_BPQM_LOG_AUDITORIA START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE;
sql.mssql: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_BPQM_LOG_AUDITORIA START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1;

CREATE TABLE BPQMDOM_PRIORIDADE ( IDPRIORIDADE BIGINT NOT NULL, DESCRICAO VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, PRAZO_DIAS BIGINT, ATIVO CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'S' NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_BPQM_DOM_PRIORIDADE PRIMARY KEY (IDPRIORIDADE), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_DOM_PRIOR_AT CHECK (ATIVO IN ('S','N')) );
